<!--
Thank you for helping improve TrustDB.

Before submitting this compatibility template, please prefer the structured
Bug, Feature, or Engineering Task form shown on the New issue page:
https://github.com/wowtrust/trustdb/issues/new/choose

Questions, deployment help, and early integration ideas belong in Discussions:
https://github.com/wowtrust/trustdb/discussions

Security vulnerabilities must be reported privately:
https://github.com/wowtrust/trustdb/security/advisories/new

Do not publish credentials, private keys, tokens, customer data, private
endpoints, or exploitable vulnerability details.

Contribution requirements:
https://github.com/wowtrust/trustdb/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
-->

## Context

Describe the user, operator, or developer problem and the affected TrustDB component.

## Expected and current behavior

Explain what you expected, what happened instead, and why the difference matters.

## Reproduction or proposed scope

Provide minimal reproduction steps for a bug, or a bounded goal and non-goals for proposed work.

## Validation

List the checks, fixtures, platforms, or acceptance criteria that can confirm completion.

## Security, compatibility, and operations impact

Describe any effect on proof semantics, keys, formats, persistence, recovery, APIs, deployment, or performance. Write `None expected` when not applicable.
